images.alt: Home Medix HM-KX 10 LPM oxygen concentrator — white floor-standing chassis with castors and HM logo

Home Medix differentiators.One-Touch SOS Alert: Yes — high-volume audible alarm button for summoning a nearby attendant (local siren; no mobile app or telecom channel)
Home Medix differentiators.Warranty: 3 years or 10,000 hours of operation, whichever comes first

faqs.q: What is the HM-KX's output range?
faqs.a: 0.5 to 10 L/min of continuous flow at 93% ± 3% oxygen concentration, per the published technical specification. That puts it in the high-flow stationary class typically needed for severe COPD, ILD progression, post-discharge high-flow therapy, or ventilator bridging at home.

The published sound spec is ≤ 48 dB at 1 m, field-verified. That ties the Nidek Nuvo 10 as the quietest 10 LPM on the Indian market. For 24/7 LTOT use, placement in an adjacent room with tubing extension is common at this flow class.

The HM-KX can deliver oxygen-rich nebulized medication through the same circuit, eliminating the need for a separate nebulizer during treatment. The feature is useful when patients on high-flow O₂ also require nebulized bronchodilators or steroids.

faqs.q: What power draw should a stabiliser support?
faqs.a: The HM-KX draws 550 VA — the lowest in the 10 LPM class. A servo stabiliser rated for roughly 825 VA (1.5× the rated draw) is the conventional sizing for Indian mains voltage variance. In areas with frequent outages, pair with an online UPS or a pure-sine inverter — not a square-wave one, which can damage the compressor motor.
3 years or 10,000 hours of operation, whichever comes first. For a unit running continuously in a chronic LTOT setting, the hour counter typically reaches 10,000 before the 3-year calendar limit.

description_text: The HM-KX is Home Medix's 10 LPM high-flow stationary oxygen concentrator. Published specs cover 0.5–10 L/min continuous flow, 93% ± 3% oxygen concentration, ≤ 48 dB sound level (field-verified, ties Nidek Nuvo 10 as class-quietest), 550 VA at 230V / 50Hz (lowest in the 10 LPM class), 25.6 kg, and 368 × 346 × 695 mm footprint. Feature set includes integrated nebulization, a precise electronic flowmeter, a one-touch SOS audible siren, smart safety alarms, and an industrial-grade compressor. ISO 9001 + ISO 13485 + CDSCO approved with a 3-year / 10,000-hour warranty.
